notes:
At the first start the cursor won't move through the entire window. Press Alt+Enter to go into windowed mode until you are in the menu. After that, select either windowed or windowed full screen in the settings.

On my system, using DXVK, I locked the framerate to 60 FPS and it was almost rock solid, short of some parts in the opening sequence, where I could see the main menu for some frames during gameplay.

Using WINED3D gave me very glitchy graphics and single digit FPS numbers.
title: Moons of Madness
